name: Final Fantasy: Legend of the Crystals
original_name: ファイナルファンタジー
overview: 200 years after Bartz and his friends saved two worlds from Exdeath, a threat arises and seeks to take the Crystals for itself. Linaly, a descendant of Bartz, and her friend/protector Prettz journey to the Temple of Wind to seek the source of this new danger.

trailers.title: Final Fantasy Legend of the crystals trailer
